calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Riordan Sykes for Richard Wilptz.

The Court stated that the matter appeared to be in order and granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Continued To Jun-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Riordan Sykes for and with Richard Wilpitz (Trustee).

Ms. Sykes stated that the Trustee discovered new facts with regard to the Sax Realty account, that it would affect the residue, provided account balances and stated that the account could now be traced. The Court informed Ms. Sykes that an amended petition needed to be filed with 30 days notice. The matter was continued to June 30, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
